sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Sound Shore Management Inc CT Decreases Stake in Zimmer Biomet Holdings, Inc. $ZBH
feed.summary: Sound Shore Management Inc CT reduced its stake in Zimmer Biomet Holdings, Inc. by 3.3% in the third quarter, now holding 896,284 shares valued at $88.3 million. Despite a Q4 earnings beat and a new share buyback program, the medical equipment provider issued cautious FY2026 guidance, citing potential headwinds. Analyst consensus is a "Hold" with a $106.45 price target, while institutional investors own nearly 89% of the company.

feed.title: Gates Industrial Corporation Plc Q4 Profit Climbs
feed.summary: Gates Industrial Corporation Plc (GTES) reported a significant increase in its fourth-quarter profit, with earnings climbing to $51.3 million, or $0.20 per share, compared to $36.5 million, or $0.14 per share, in the prior year. Excluding certain items, the company's adjusted earnings were $99.2 million, or $0.38 per share. Revenue for the period also saw a rise of 3.2% to $856.2 million from $829.4 million last year.

feed.title: Chimera Investment Corporation (NYSE:CIM) Q4 2025 Earnings Call Transcript
feed.summary: Chimera Investment Corporation (NYSE:CIM) held its Q4 2025 earnings call, reporting GAAP net income of $7 million ($0.08 per share) and an increase in its quarterly dividend by 22% to $0.45 per share for Q1 2026. The company discussed its successful transformation into a hybrid REIT by diversifying its portfolio and acquiring Home Express Mortgage, which contributed to increased earnings power. Key focuses for 2026 include further portfolio diversification, liquidity expansion, and growth in fee-based income, both organically and through strategic acquisitions.

feed.title: Morgan Stanley Lifts CEO’s Pay 32% to $45 Million for 2025
feed.summary: Morgan Stanley has increased CEO Ted Pick's pay by 32% to $45 million for 2025 following a record year for the firm. This compensation package includes deferred bonuses and equity awards, reflecting the board's satisfaction with his "outstanding" performance. Other top Wall Street executives also received significant pay raises, with Goldman Sachs, Wells Fargo, and JPMorgan Chase also increasing their CEOs' compensation.

feed.title: Smurfit Westrock PLC (NYSE:SW) Q4 2025 earnings call transcript
feed.summary: The article is a Q4 2025 earnings call transcript for Smurfit Westrock PLC (NYSE:SW).

feed.title: There May Be Some Bright Spots In Bio-Techne's (NASDAQ:TECH) Earnings
feed.summary: Bio-Techne Corporation (NASDAQ:TECH) recently reported earnings that were weaker than expected due to a significant US$155m expense classified as an "unusual item." Simply Wall St analysis suggests that despite the statutory profit being lower, the underlying earnings potential of the company might be stronger than it appears, as these unusual items are typically one-off. Investors are encouraged to look beyond the reported profit and consider other factors like margins, growth forecasts, and return on investment while being aware of the associated risks.

feed.title: State Street Corp Is Quietly Owning Wall Street – But Should You Put Your Money In STT?
feed.summary: State Street Corp operates as a major, yet often unnoticed, player in the financial industry, handling asset servicing, custody, and ETFs for institutional clients. While not a high-growth stock, its stability, vital role in financial infrastructure, and recurring revenue streams make it a potential long-term investment for those seeking a value and dividend play rather than quick returns. The article suggests that STT is more for "grown-up money moves" than "FOMO plays," fitting into a diversified, long-horizon portfolio.

feed.title: Utility PG&E tightens 2026 profit forecast on strong power demand By Reuters
feed.summary: PG&E has tightened its full-year 2026 profit forecast, raising the lower end of its range due to strong power demand from data centers and general load growth. The company also reported an adjusted profit of 36 cents per share for the quarter ended December 31, which missed analysts' average estimates, causing shares to fall 1% in premarket trading. PG&E plans to invest $73 billion by 2030 in transmission upgrades to support electricity demand, particularly from AI data centers, and has advanced 2 GW of data center projects into final engineering.

feed.title: FedEx bets on smarter supply chains in $98B growth plan to 2029
feed.summary: FedEx announced its strategic vision through 2029, aiming for $98 billion in revenue and $6 billion in adjusted free cash flow by prioritizing growth in high-margin sectors, expanding digital and AI capabilities, and optimizing its network. The company also provided a third fiscal quarter update, expecting adjusted earnings per share to exceed consensus, and confirmed its FedEx Freight spin-off is on track for June 1, 2026. These initiatives are designed to create a more flexible, efficient, and intelligent network, driving significant profit improvement and stockholder value.

feed.title: Monitoring made inverters more essential to solar project performance
feed.summary: Advances in monitoring technology have transformed solar inverters into sophisticated "power management platforms" capable of granularly tracking energy loads, battery storage, EVs, and even individual PV cell performance. This enhanced monitoring is crucial for diagnosing malfunctions, enabling proactive and predictive maintenance, and optimizing solar array performance, especially in response to evolving grid policies like NEM 3.0. Inverter monitoring ensures system owners achieve expected financial returns and provides peace of mind through improved system uptime and efficiency.

feed.title: Youdao, Inc. (NYSE:DAO) Q4 2025 Earnings Call Transcript
feed.summary: Youdao, Inc. (NYSE:DAO) announced strong Q4 and full-year 2025 financial results, with net revenues reaching RMB 1.6 billion in Q4, a 16.8% increase year-over-year, and operating profit growing to RMB 221.3 million for the full year. The company achieved its first full year of net cash inflow from operating activities, driven by growth in Learning Services and online marketing, both largely propelled by its AI-native strategy. Looking to 2026, Youdao plans to continue leveraging AI to enhance product offerings, expand into new market segments, and drive sustainable growth across its business lines, with a particular focus on AI agents and international expansion for online marketing.

feed.title: T-Mobile US, Inc. (NASDAQ:TMUS) Q4 2025 Earnings Call Transcript
feed.summary: T-Mobile US, Inc. reported its Q4 2025 earnings, missing EPS expectations at $1.88 against an anticipated $2.05. Despite the EPS miss, the company highlighted significant achievements in customer growth, network leadership, and financial performance, outlining strong forecasts for 2026 and 2027 driven by widened differentiation in network, value, and customer experience. T-Mobile also announced a revised strategy for financial reporting, focusing on postpaid accounts and ARPA growth, along with accelerated share buybacks and continued investment in new growth areas like financial services and AI RAN.

feed.title: Crown Crafts, Inc. (NASDAQ:CRWS) Q3 2026 Earnings Call Transcript
feed.summary: Crown Crafts, Inc. held its Q3 2026 earnings call, reporting net sales of $20.7 million and net income of $1.5 million. The company discussed challenges including reduced demand in the infant bedding category due to consumer price sensitivity, elevated tariffs on Chinese imports, and ongoing efforts to diversify sourcing and consolidate operations. They also highlighted the relaunch of Groovy Girls dolls and a significant insurance payout related to a prior acquisition.

feed.title: Paycom Software, Inc. (NYSE:PAYC) Q4 2025 Earnings Call Transcript
feed.summary: Paycom Software, Inc. (NYSE:PAYC) reported its Q4 and full-year 2025 earnings, missing EPS expectations ($2.07 reported vs. $2.44 expected) but achieving strong revenue growth and record adjusted EBITDA margins. The company highlighted its focus on full solution automation, client ROI, and world-class service, which led to an increased annual revenue retention rate of 91% and significant productivity gains for clients using their AI-driven products like IWant. Despite a strong performance in 2025, Paycom provided a more conservative growth outlook for 2026, aiming for 6-7% total revenue growth, while emphasizing opportunities in new logo acquisition and continued technological advancement in automation.

feed.title: Martin Marietta Materials, Inc. (NYSE:MLM) Q4 2025 Earnings Call Transcript
feed.summary: Martin Marietta Materials, Inc. (NYSE:MLM) held its Q4 2025 earnings call, reporting that EPS of $3.85 missed expectations of $4.78. Despite challenges in private construction, the company achieved record financial, operational, and safety performance in 2025, driven by its aggregates and specialties businesses. The 2026 outlook anticipates continued strength from infrastructure projects and growth in data centers and energy, offsetting softness in residential and some non-residential construction.

feed.title: RBC Raises Price Target on Coeur Mining to $26 From $22, Keeps Outperform Rating
feed.summary: RBC Capital Markets has increased its price target for Coeur Mining (CDE) to $26 from $22, while maintaining an "Outperform" rating on the stock. This adjustment reflects RBC's continued positive outlook on the diversified precious metals producer. The article also provides recent news headlines related to Coeur Mining and its operations.

feed.title: Euronet Worldwide Reports Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2025 Financial Results
feed.summary: Euronet Worldwide announced its financial results for Q4 and full year 2025, showing revenue growth and strategic expansions despite an 18% decrease in Q4 operating income. The company reported a 6% increase in full-year revenues and a 12% rise in full-year adjusted earnings per share. Euronet projects double-digit adjusted earnings growth for 2026, driven by its digital-first strategy and capital allocation.

feed.title: Assurant, Inc. (NYSE:AIZ) Q4 2025 Earnings Call Transcript
feed.summary: Assurant Inc. (NYSE:AIZ) reported strong Q4 and full-year 2025 results, marking its ninth consecutive year of profitable growth with double-digit increases in adjusted EBITDA and EPS, excluding catastrophes. The company saw significant growth in Global Lifestyle, driven by Connected Living and Global Automotive, and exceptional performance in Global Housing. Looking to 2026, Assurant anticipates continued high-single-digit growth in Global Lifestyle and solid underlying growth in Global Housing, while making strategic investments in areas like home warranty.

feed.title: American Electric Power 4Q Profit Falls on Ongoing Energy Investments
feed.summary: American Electric Power (AEP) reported a fall in fourth-quarter profit despite higher revenue, primarily due to significant investments in energy infrastructure. The utility company plans to expand its capital expenditure to meet rising energy demand, especially from hyperscalers and data centers powering AI ambitions. AEP maintains a positive outlook for its 2026 operating earnings, showcasing confidence in its strategic investments.

feed.title: American International Group, Inc. (NYSE:AIG) Q4 2025 Earnings Call Transcript
feed.summary: American International Group, Inc. (AIG) reported strong fourth-quarter and full-year 2025 financial results, with significant increases in adjusted after-tax income per diluted share and underwriting income. The company highlighted successful reinsurance renewals, strategic transactions including the Everest retail insurance portfolio acquisition and an investment in Convex Group, and advancements in its GenAI initiatives. AIG also announced a leadership transition with Eric Anderson as the new President and CEO-elect, and committed to returning capital to shareholders through buybacks and dividends, with expectations for low to mid-teens net premiums written growth in 2026.

feed.title: Highwoods Properties, Inc. (NYSE:HIW) Q4 2025 Earnings Call Transcript
feed.summary: Highwoods Properties, Inc. discussed its Q4 2025 earnings, reporting solid financial performance with FFO of $0.90 per share and full-year FFO of $3.48 per share. The company is optimistic about the next few years due to strong Sunbelt market fundamentals, limited new supply, and an anticipated increase in NOI and earnings from occupancy gains and development stabilization. Highwoods also highlighted its strategic capital recycling, including significant acquisitions and dispositions, aimed at enhancing long-term growth and portfolio quality.

feed.title: Kimco, TransUnion, Crocs Deliver Q4 Results and Guidance
feed.summary: Kimco Realty, TransUnion, and Crocs, Inc. have released their Q4 earnings reports, showing a mix of strong performances and strategic adaptations. Kimco and TransUnion both surpassed EPS and revenue expectations, driven by high occupancy rates and strategic transformations respectively. Crocs also exceeded earnings forecasts, despite a challenging retail market, through strategic cost savings and brand strengthening.

feed.title: Open World and VerifyMe Sign Merger Agreement
feed.summary: VerifyMe, Inc. (NASDAQ:VRME) and Open World Ltd. have signed an Agreement and Plan of Merger to create a NASDAQ-listed institutional-grade real-world asset tokenization company. The merger aims to establish a leading infrastructure provider in the digital asset and tokenization sector, focusing on token listings, regulated digital asset infrastructure, and institutional RWA tokenization. The combined entity is expected to be listed on Nasdaq under a new ticker symbol, pending shareholder and regulatory approvals, anticipated by Q2 2026.

feed.title: Lockheed Martin, Fujitsu Sign Initial Contract for SPY-7 Radar Power Supply Units for Japan’s ASEV
feed.summary: Lockheed Martin and Fujitsu have signed a contract for the initial procurement of power supply units for Japan's Aegis System Equipped Vessels (ASEV) SPY-7 radar. This agreement formalizes Fujitsu as a key supplier for the SPY-7 Subarray Suite Power Supply Line Replaceable Unit (PS LRU), strengthening Japan's defense production capabilities. The SPY-7 radar, developed by Lockheed Martin, is designed for ballistic missile defense and is a core component of Japan's layered missile defense architecture, with fierce competition for future Aegis destroyer radar selections.

feed.title: Gates Industrial shares tumble over 7% despite earnings beat
feed.summary: Gates Industrial (NYSE:GTES) reported fourth-quarter earnings that slightly exceeded analyst expectations and revenue that was also slightly above estimates. Despite the beat, the company's shares fell sharply by 7.7% in pre-market trading, largely due to 2026 guidance that suggests limited growth ahead. The company anticipates core sales growth of 1% to 4% and adjusted EBITDA between $775 million and $835 million for 2026.

feed.title: The 2026 Porsche Macan GTS Electric Is Your EV Giga-Hatch: Review
feed.summary: The 2026 Porsche Macan GTS Electric offers a compelling blend of performance and luxury, positioned between the 4S and Turbo trims. With 563 horsepower from dual electric motors, it achieves a 0-60 mph sprint in 3.6 seconds and provides enhanced handling, especially with optional summer performance tires. Starting at $107,650, the GTS delivers a powerful driving experience that maintains comfort for daily use despite its sporty enhancements.

feed.title: How To Earn $500 A Month From Expedia Stock Ahead Of Q4 Earnings
feed.summary: This article details how investors can earn a passive income of $500 or $100 monthly from Expedia stock dividends. It calculates the necessary investment based on Expedia's current annual dividend yield of 0.68% ($1.60 per share annually) and explains how dividend yield can fluctuate with stock price and dividend payment changes. The article also provides analyst expectations for Expedia's upcoming Q4 earnings, forecasting increased earnings per share and revenue.

feed.title: Public comment hearing on proposed PNM sale
feed.summary: The New Mexico Public Regulation Commission is holding a virtual public comment hearing on Thursday, February 12th, regarding the proposed sale of PNM to Blackstone Infrastructure. This session follows an earlier hearing on February 5th, which saw significant community interest. PNM and TXNM Energy Inc. are seeking approval for acquisition by Troy ParentCo LLC, a subsidiary of Blackstone Infrastructure, with additional in-person and virtual hearings planned, including one in Albuquerque on February 17th.

feed.title: US Bancorp’s Digital Pivot: How a Century-Old Bank Is Rebuilding Itself as a Platform
feed.summary: US Bancorp is transforming from a traditional regional bank into a full-stack digital financial platform, emphasizing infrastructure, integration, and intentional focus. By rebuilding its core digital experience with unified access, embedded intelligence, and modular services, it aims to compete with tech-forward incumbents and fintechs by being a foundational financial infrastructure provider. This digital pivot is expected to impact its stock valuation, potentially re-rating it from a regional lender to a robust financial operating system.

feed.title: Rain Enhancement Technologies Reports More Than 20% Snowpack Enhancement in Utah During January Operations
feed.summary: Rain Enhancement Technologies (NASDAQ: RAIN) announced that its Weather Enhancement Technology Array (WETA) system achieved over 20% snowpack enhancement in Utah's La Sal Mountains during January 2026 operations, despite one of the driest winters on record. The company's technology demonstrated an additional 3.5 inches of snowpack compared to a control site, validating its effectiveness in severe drought conditions. This performance builds on previous results and is critical for water-stressed regions, as mountain snowpack provides 95% of Utah's water supply.

feed.title: The Hartford’s Future Of Benefits Study: Employers Seeking Simplicity And Ease In The Face Of Increasingly Complex Landscape
feed.summary: The Hartford's 2026 Future of Benefits Study reveals that employers are seeking simplicity and ease in managing increasingly complex employee benefits landscapes, driven by evolving HR responsibilities and technology. The study highlights the need for integrated solutions, with HR professionals looking for "one-stop-shop" offerings that combine enrollment tools, simple leave products, seamless technology, and expert claims administration. While technology and AI are gaining importance, there's a strong preference for human support for sensitive and complex issues, and ongoing challenges in employee education regarding benefits persist.

feed.title: Truist launches secure open banking experience
feed.summary: Truist Financial Corporation has launched its first open banking integration, partnering with Mastercard to provide consumer and small business clients with secure, centralized access to their financial data. This new API-based platform empowers clients with greater control over their financial information and enables seamless connections to trusted fintech applications without sharing usernames or passwords. The initiative aims to enhance transparency, personalization, and security in financial management for Truist customers.

feed.title: Rollins Posts Downbeat Results, Joins Paycom Software, Cisco, Applovin And Other Big Stocks Moving Lower In Thursday's Pre-Market Session
feed.summary: Rollins Inc. reported weaker-than-expected quarterly financial results, causing its shares to drop sharply in pre-market trading. Several other major companies, including Paycom Software, Cisco, AppLovin, and Inspire Medical Systems, also saw their stock prices decline following their respective earnings reports or financial guidance. This collective downturn indicates a challenging pre-market session for these big stocks.

feed.title: Here Are Thursday’s Top Wall Street Analyst Research Calls: BP Plc., Borg Warner, Generac, Kraft-Heinz, MercadoLibre, Pfizer, Shopify, Valvoline, and More
feed.summary: This article provides a summary of top Wall Street analyst upgrades, downgrades, and initiations for various companies on Thursday, February 12, 2026. It also reviews the market's performance, including stock futures, Treasury bonds, oil and gas, gold, and cryptocurrency markets, following a volatile Wednesday driven by non-farm payrolls data. Investors are now looking ahead to Friday's consumer price index report for further market direction.

feed.title: As Des Moines loses another indie music venue, local artists wonder what's next
feed.summary: Des Moines is experiencing a significant decline in independent music venues, narrowing opportunities for local artists to perform and grow, as evidenced by the closure of Lefty's Live Music. This trend is compounded by the increasing influence of entertainment giants like Live Nation, which, while bringing major acts to the city, makes it harder for smaller venues and original artists to thrive. Local artists and venue operators express concern over the shrinking independent scene but remain optimistic about the resilience of Des Moines' music culture.

feed.title: Howmet Aerospace 2025 Profit Surges 40% as Commercial and Defense Markets Expand
feed.summary: Howmet Aerospace (HWM) reported record financial results for Q4 and full-year 2025, driven by strong growth in its commercial and defense aerospace markets. The company saw a 15% increase in Q4 revenue and a 40% rise in full-year adjusted EPS, with an optimistic outlook for continued expansion in 2026, including projected revenue growth of approximately 10%. However, the company faces risks such as high reliance on aerospace, potential supply chain disruptions, and acquisition integration challenges.

feed.title: Cintas Insiders Sold US$4.0m Of Shares Suggesting Hesitancy
feed.summary: Over the past year, Cintas Corporation (NASDAQ:CTAS) insiders sold a significant US$4.0 million worth of shares, particularly a large sale by the CEO. While the selling price was above the current market price, the overall trend shows more selling than buying. Despite high insider ownership (14%), these transactions suggest potential hesitancy among insiders, which shareholders should note.

feed.title: Investing in AutoZone (NYSE:AZO) five years ago would have delivered you a 213% gain
feed.summary: Shares of AutoZone, Inc. (NYSE:AZO) have seen a significant increase of 213% over the last five years, outperforming its earnings per share (EPS) growth of 14% annually during the same period. This suggests that the market's perception of the company has become more favorable. The article also notes recent insider buying, which is generally considered a positive sign for the stock.

feed.title: SLB Awarded Multiple Offshore Drilling Contracts by Mubadala Energy for Tangkulo Deepwater Development in Indonesia
feed.summary: SLB has secured multiple offshore drilling services contracts from Mubadala Energy for the Tangkulo natural gas deepwater development and associated drilling activities in the Andaman Sea, Indonesia. This partnership involves SLB providing integrated drilling and well services, leveraging advanced technologies to reduce operational risk and enhance efficiency. The project aims for first gas production by the end of 2028, contributing to Indonesia's energy security.

feed.title: Inovalon Named Global Leaders Champion for Scaling ScriptMed® on Oracle AI Database to Power Pharmacy Operations
feed.summary: Inovalon has expanded its collaboration with Oracle, standardizing its ScriptMed specialty and infusion pharmacy management software on Oracle Autonomous AI Database on Oracle Cloud Infrastructure (OCI). Oracle recognized Inovalon as a Global Leaders Champion for its innovative use of the Oracle Autonomous AI Database to scale ScriptMed for transaction processing. This partnership aims to provide pharmacies with a robust, flexible, and scalable technology solution to manage increasing volumes of complex therapies and rapidly growing operations.

feed.title: U.S. Department of the Air Force Accelerates Cloud Modernization with Oracle
feed.summary: The U.S. Department of the Air Force has awarded Oracle an $88 million contract to provide Oracle Cloud Infrastructure (OCI) services for its Cloud One program, continuing Oracle's involvement in cloud modernization for the Department of War. This task order enables mission owners to leverage OCI's security, performance, and resiliency, including Oracle AI Database 26ai, to support critical national security missions. The services will be performed at contractor-designated facilities across the United States through December 2028.

feed.title: Earnings Flash (GTES) Gates Industrial Corporation plc Posts Q4 Adjusted EPS $0.38 per Share, vs. FactSet Est of $0.36
feed.summary: Gates Industrial Corporation plc (GTES) reported Q4 adjusted earnings per share of $0.38, surpassing the FactSet estimate of $0.36. The company also reported Q4 revenue of $856.2 million, slightly above the FactSet estimate of $853.3 million. Additionally, Gates Industrial provided 2026 adjusted EPS guidance ranging from $1.52 to $1.68, compared to FactSet's estimate of $1.58.

feed.title: Leidos to launch next phase of DODNet transformation through accelerated migration of defense agencies
feed.summary: Leidos is accelerating the migration of eight additional Defense Agencies and Field Activities to DODNet, DISA's modern network environment, building on the successful transition of five agencies this year. This effort will transition over 100,000 users over the next 18 months and marks a significant step in the $11.5 billion, 10-year Defense Enclave Services program. The transformation aims to enhance user experience, advance Zero Trust compliance, and strengthen mission readiness through enterprise IT consolidation.

feed.title: Leidos is shifting 100,000 defense users onto one secure network
feed.summary: Leidos is accelerating the migration of eight additional Defense agencies, including over 100,000 users, to the DODNet over the next 18 months. This initiative is a significant phase of the $11.5 billion, 10-year Defense Enclave Services program, building on previous successful transitions and aligning with Leidos' NorthStar 2030 digital modernization strategy. The aim is to enhance user experience, advance Zero Trust compliance, and strengthen security and data access for various defense agencies.

feed.title: NYSE Launches NYSE Texas Advisory Board to Shape Future Expansion in the State
feed.summary: The New York Stock Exchange (NYSE), part of Intercontinental Exchange, Inc. (NYSE: ICE), has launched the NYSE Texas Advisory Board to enhance its presence in the southwestern U.S. This initiative builds on the success of NYSE Texas, which has achieved over 100 dual-listings in its first year, establishing itself as a leading exchange in the state. The board, composed of prominent business leaders, aims to guide future expansion and support for issuers in Texas and beyond.

feed.title: Is Howmet Aerospace Inc. (NYSE:HWM) Worth US$231 Based On Its Intrinsic Value?
feed.summary: A Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) model estimates Howmet Aerospace (NYSE:HWM) to have a fair value of US$171, suggesting it is currently 35% overvalued compared to its share price of US$231. Analysts, however, have a price target of US$247, which is 44% above this fair value estimate. The article details the assumptions and calculations used in the two-stage DCF model, emphasizing that valuation is an estimate.

feed.title: Euronet Reports Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2025 Financial Results
feed.summary: Euronet Worldwide, Inc. announced its financial results for the fourth quarter and full year 2025, highlighting revenue growth but noting pressures in Money Transfer and epay segments. Despite these challenges, the company achieved a 12% increase in full-year adjusted earnings per share and expects further double-digit adjusted earnings growth in 2026 due to strategic investments and diversified revenue streams. Key achievements include the planned acquisition of CrediaBank's merchant acquiring business and expanded digital partnerships.

feed.title: Dollar Deceleration - Northern Trust - Commentaries
feed.summary: The article discusses the recent deceleration of the U.S. dollar, which began in 2025 and accelerated in early 2026 due to geopolitical events and concerns about U.S. fiscal sustainability. This led investors, typically seeking dollar assets during crises, to opt for alternatives like gold and silver, which saw significant gains in January. However, this rally proved unsustainable, with precious metals retreating after the nomination of a new Federal Reserve Chair, while industrial metals maintained their value.

feed.title: CarMax names new CEO: What we know about Keith Barr
feed.summary: CarMax has announced Keith Barr, formerly of InterContinental Hotels Group (IHG), as its new President and CEO. Barr's appointment comes as CarMax seeks to navigate a "critical juncture" and drive future growth, following recent layoffs and leadership changes. He brings experience in enhancing customer experience, leading digital transformations, and building brand loyalty.

feed.title: Midwest Trust Co Invests $1.94 Million in CAVA Group, Inc. $CAVA
feed.summary: Midwest Trust Co recently invested $1.94 million in CAVA Group, Inc. by purchasing 32,133 shares. This new stake contributes to institutional investors owning approximately 73.15% of the company, with other firms like Valeo Financial Advisors and Renaissance Capital also increasing their positions. Analysts generally rate CAVA as a "Moderate Buy" with an average price target of $81.50, despite some recent insider selling.
